ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the parameter belongs to */,
  "samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the model */,
  "features" INTEGER /* Number of features used in the model */,
  "binary_features" INTEGER /* Number of binary features used in the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "data_preprocessing" TEXT /* JSON column to store data preprocessing steps */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameters were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "fold_index" INTEGER /* Index of the fold used in the evaluation */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the model */,
  "leaves" INTEGER /* Number of leaves in the model */,
  "nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the model */,
  "training_score" REAL /* Training score of the model */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Testing score of the model */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version used for evaluation */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of training to testing data */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the evaluation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation result the metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC-AUC score for classification models */,
  "r2_score" REAL /* R-squared score for regression models */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES evaluation_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, model developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed by the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time of comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tex_files" (
  "tex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TEX file */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the TEX file belongs to */,
  "tex_file" TEXT /* TEX file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the TEX file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the TEX file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tex_files_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the dataset version belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
